request.payload_shape_note: rptDiscoverSwitches() builds {cluster_ip, auth_method:'password', token:'', tech_port:true, node_user, node_password}. Body not captured by browser_network_requests; reconstructed from frontend/templates/reporter.html L1793-L1801.

response.body_note: Body not captured by MCP. Per src/app.py /api/discover error handler, response is application/json with shape {error, message} where message contains the VMSDiscoveryError text. Confirmed in UI via 02-post-click-error.png: 'Error: Could not parse management IP from ip addr output: \'\''.

summary: POST /api/discover -> 500 Internal Server Error. Server-side trace in 05-server-log.txt: Step 1 (motd parse) succeeded with VMS internal IP 172.16.128.4; Step 2 (ip addr -> parse_management_ip) returned None and raised VMSDiscoveryError. UI surfaced the exception text directly inside the Switch Placement Editor modal.
